channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-01 21:11 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Stating that women do not have penises is conservative. Stating that the scientific method is superi...
item.description: Stating that women do not have penises is conservative. Stating that the scientific method is superior to ancestral tribal dances for seeking truth is conservative. Supporting a rational immigration policy is conservative. Defending freedom of speech & freedom of inquiry is conservative. Stating that cultures that don't kill gays are superior to those that do is conservative. Basically, rationality is conservatism. Parasitic irrationality is progressivism.

item.title: @elonmusk: Ever since I saw a photo like this in 2018 I wanted to do this. It took me 8 years, but I finally go...
item.description: Ever since I saw a photo like this in 2018 I wanted to do this. It took me 8 years, but I finally got it.

item.title: @elonmusk: And so it begins… LA City Councilmen Hugo Soto Martinez & Ysabel Jurado have unveiled a plan to let ...
item.description: And so it begins… LA City Councilmen Hugo Soto Martinez & Ysabel Jurado have unveiled a plan to let "noncitizens" VOTE in LA elections There are 1.5 million noncitizens in LA 15% of their entire population

item.description: Starlink is seriously just awesome.

item.title: @elonmusk: The dangerous notion that all people are interchangeable stems from the blank slate myth. Excellent ...
item.description: The dangerous notion that all people are interchangeable stems from the blank slate myth. Excellent IQ post, Penny. Great work.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.3
item.description: Grok 4.3

item.title: @elonmusk: Our new 125 kW Basecharger is designed for longer dwell times and overnight charging of Semis. It's ...
item.description: Our new 125 kW Basecharger is designed for longer dwell times and overnight charging of Semis. It's the "home charging" for heavy-duty fleets. It features a fully integrated design that eliminates the need for a separate AC-to-DC cabinet, simplifying installation. The 6 meter cable offers layout flexibility for all depots. Up to 3 Basechargers can be daisy-chained on a single breaker (sharing 125 kVA) to further reduce installation and operational costs.

item.title: @elonmusk: I'm discovering the use of agent mode on Grok Imagine. It's a revolution in the use of generative AI...
item.description: I'm discovering the use of agent mode on Grok Imagine. It's a revolution in the use of generative AI.

item.title: @elonmusk: When training Grok 4.3, we spoke directly with devs and businesses to understand what they actually ...
item.description: When training Grok 4.3, we spoke directly with devs and businesses to understand what they actually needed: a model that’s fast, affordable, and great at tool calling. The result is a daily driver that doesn't just look good on random benchmarks, but is actually useful in the real world. 💰 $1.25 in / $2.50 out ⚡️ 100 tokens / second 📖 1 million context window Try it through Hermes Agent or direct through the xAI API!

item.description: Grok 4.3 on Vercel

item.title: @elonmusk: "He is too retarded. He does not understand reality. He is unable to stop raping" Oh, are you puttin...
item.description: "He is too retarded. He does not understand reality. He is unable to stop raping" Oh, are you putting him in a psychiatric hospital? "No." Oh, is he going to jail forever? "No." Are you deporting him? "No." Will he be monitored once released? "No."

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨 WTF?! 20 MAJOR SCHOOL DISTRICTS have CANCELED classes so that students and teachers can attend ANT...
item.description: 🚨 WTF?! 20 MAJOR SCHOOL DISTRICTS have CANCELED classes so that students and teachers can attend ANTI-CAPITALISM "May Day" protests across the country Our public schools are nothing more than taxpayer funded indoctrination camps controlled by Teachers Unions Teachers' Unions are corrupting our youth.

item.title: @elonmusk: They lowkey could make a movie about the kind of sh*t we pulled thru to overhaul the new X ads mange...
item.description: They lowkey could make a movie about the kind of sh*t we pulled thru to overhaul the new X ads manger. The old Twitter stack really had some skeletons in the closet lol
